description: A graphic built around a photograph of an illuminated business sign reading 'Quality Learing Center' with a phone number '612-702-4012' and a small house-and-tree logo. Below, a 'DAILY CALLER' label and a white serif headline read 'Feds Raid Infamous "Quality Learing Center," Other Businesses Tied To Alleged Somali Fraud', with a small DHS seal at the bottom.
notable_text: Quality Learing Center; 612-702-4012; DAILY CALLER; Feds Raid Infamous Quality Learing Center, Other Businesses Tied To Alleged Somali Fraud
